tools.name: OpenAI GPT-5.4
tools.reason: Strong general-purpose enterprise tool for reasoning, tool use and document-backed outputs.
tools.policy_notes: Use when managed cloud routing is acceptable and business-facing output quality matters.

tools.name: Claude Enterprise
tools.reason: Strong long-context reasoning stack for synthesis, planning and enterprise review flows.
tools.policy_notes: Use when long-context synthesis and executive writing quality are primary concerns.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.reason: Useful when multimodal ingestion and web-connected exploration improve the workflow.
tools.policy_notes: Use when web retrieval or multimodal handling is part of the intended operating path.

tools.name: Local LLaMA stack
tools.reason: Useful when confidentiality is high and the workflow can stay inside a restricted execution zone.
tools.policy_notes: Prefer for high-confidentiality internal workflows where local execution is required.

tools.name: n8n + MCP toolchain
tools.reason: Best orchestration layer for connecting triggers, approvals, tools and business systems.
tools.policy_notes: Use as the control plane when workflow traceability and tool routing matter.
